subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Divine! The learned, the mystics and the rulers, for the most part, remain deprived, while thou art privy to the mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی علما و عرفا و امراء اکثری محروم ماندند و تو محرم راز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @high station of the true believer
